functions.name: Console.log in code
functions.description: Console.log should be replaced with proper logging library for web apps/services. For CLI tools, console.log is appropriate and expected - this is not an issue for CLI projects.

recommendation.title: Use proper logging (for web apps)
recommendation.description: Console.log should be replaced with proper logging library for web apps/services. For CLI tools, console.log is appropriate and expected - this is not an issue for CLI projects.

fix: For web apps/services: Use logging library (winston, pino)
For CLI tools: console.log is appropriate - no change needed
